line: Для Каждого Строка Из Таблица Цикл
// English controls and an emoji are intentional 🛰️.
Answer = True AND NOT False OR Undefined = NULL;
For Each Item In Value Do
Return StrTemplate("%1:%2:%3", Clean, Count, Stamp) + Temp + Encoded;
